title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 545.160 - Venue, how stated
text:
545.160.  Venue, how stated. — It shall not be necessary to state any venue in the body of any indictment or information; but the county or other jurisdiction named in the margin thereof shall be taken to be the venue for all the facts stated in the body of the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 3944) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3555; 1919 § 3900; 1909 § 5107
